steps.title: Set up the equation from the problem constraints
steps.content:
The three parts sum to 115 cm. One part is 47 cm, and the other two parts are equal—let's call each of them $x$ cm.

$$47 + x + x = 115$$
$$47 + 2x = 115$$

steps.title: Solve for the unknown part length
steps.content:
Subtract 47 from both sides:
$$2x = 115 - 47$$
$$2x = 68$$

Divide both sides by 2:
$$x = 34$$

One of the two equal parts has length 34 cm.
